title: nerve
content_html:
nerve

domain:nerve as a discourse frame: bodily sensitivity, pain, transmission, vulnerability, shock, and the boundary between physical sensation and psychological disturbance. Use where the work invokes nervous-system language, exposed sensitivity, electric/impulsive feeling, trauma registered in the body, or the body as a conduit for affect.

domain:nerve sits between domain:medicine, domain:trauma, domain:alchemy, and themes such as theme:healing, theme:purification, theme:violation, or theme:vulnerability.

possible aliases

  • nerve
  • nervous system
  • nerves
  • sensitivity
  • shock
  • pain signal
  • bodily transmission

co-tagging pattern

  • domain:alchemy-chemistry
  • domain:medicine-disinfection
  • domain:trauma
  • theme:healing-repair
  • theme:purification
  • theme:transformation
  • theme:vulnerability
